# em.m_step_w { #tspaint.em.m_step_w }

```python
tspaint.em.m_step_w(agree, disagree, alpha, beta)
```

Per-tip credibility MAP under a ``Beta(alpha, beta)`` prior (CLAUDE.md §3.4).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**agree**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Expected (span-weighted) mass where the tip posterior agrees with its label.

<code>[**disagree**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Expected (span-weighted) mass where it disagrees.

<code>[**alpha**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Beta-prior hyperparameters (default mass near 1).

<code>[**beta**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Beta-prior hyperparameters (default mass near 1).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The MAP credibility ``w``.

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

::

    w = (alpha - 1 + agree) / (alpha + beta - 2 + agree + disagree)
